rules.description: new function keys using capslock and numbers
Teams: Map Control+W to Option+Delete (Delete Word)
Teams: Map Control+U to Cmd+Delete (Delete Line)
Map Option+J/K/P to Mouse Scroll Down/Up/Click
Wezterm shortcuts Control + K/I page down/up
Chrome shortcuts previous/next tab  cmd+j/l ( open url with cmd+o)
Chrome shortcuts Control + J/L page down/up
Map F13 to Scroll Up and F14 to Scroll Down with Acceleration
Hyper Key: Hold = Hyper (Cmd+Opt+Ctrl+Shift), Tap Alone = Escape
Left Shift to Escape if tapped alone (modifier safe)
Left Control acts as Control when held, sends Control+C when tapped.
ONLY Change left_control + up_arrow/down_arrow to page_up/down
Hyper+C to Move Focus to Next Window

manipulators.description: to_delayed_action is set to 400ms in karabiner.json
to_delayed_action is set to 400ms in karabiner.json

rules.description: Quick tap Left Command for Opt+Ctrl+Y (Slow hold remains Cmd)
